data.title: Key cryptocurrency executives witness Trump signing stablecoin bill into law; some had backed Trump's 2024 campaign.
data.description: A number of top executives from cryptocurrency firms participated in an event on Friday, with a few directly supporting Trump's 2024 campaign.

data.title: Vor Bio grants 4,373,040 stock options and 937,080 RSUs to Chief Development Officer, per Nasdaq Rule 5635(c)(4).
data.description: In Cambridge, Massachusetts, on July 18, 2025, Vor Bio, a biotech company listed on Nasdaq as VOR, shared that on July 17, 2025, Qing Zuraw, M.D., the Chief Development Officer, received 4,373,040 stock options and 937,080 restricted stock units (RSUs) upon starting her role. These stock options and RSUs were given as part of her employment agreement and adhere to Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4), falling under the Vor Biopharma Inc. 2023 Inducement Plan.

data.title: Cytokinetics grants 131,683 stock options and 88,755 RSUs to 18 new employees as inducements.
data.description: On July 16, 2025, Cytokinetics, Incorporated (Nasdaq: CYTK), based in South San Francisco, granted stock options for 131,683 shares of common stock and 88,755 restricted stock units (RSUs) to 18 new employees. These employees started in June and July 2025, and the stock options serve as a material incentive for their employment. The RSUs will convert into common stock upon vesting.

data.title: NEO Battery Materials completes final part of private placement with 1.4 million units sold at $0.50 CAD each, raising $700,000.
data.description: Canada-based NEO Battery Materials Ltd. has successfully completed its non-brokered private placement, raising $700,000 CAD in the second and final tranche of the oversubscribed offering. The company issued 1,400,000 units at a price of $0.50 CAD per unit. NEO specializes in developing low-cost silicon anode materials for lithium-ion batteries, a technology that facilitates longer battery life and faster charging. Trading under the tickers TSXV: NBM and OTC: NBMFF, NEO aims to advance battery technology for more efficient energy storage solutions.

data.title: Huntington Bancshares Inc. declares $0.155 quarterly cash dividend on common stock (Nasdaq: HBAN), unchanged from prior quarter.
data.description: In Columbus, Ohio on July 18, 2025, Huntington Bancshares Incorporated disclosed that the Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.155 per common share for the company's common stock (Nasdaq: HBAN). The rate remains the same as the previous quarter.

data.title: Big Wall Street firms are investing heavily in stablecoins, with over $4 billion in transactions.
data.description: A recent report indicates that global carbon dioxide levels have reached a record high of 415 parts per million. This surge in carbon dioxide levels comes despite efforts to reduce emissions and combat climate change. The data shows that emissions continue to rise, with an increase of 2.7% in 2018 alone. Scientists warn that this trend is alarming and urgent action is needed to prevent further damage to the environment. They emphasize the importance of reducing carbon emissions and transitioning to renewable energy sources to mitigate the impact of climate change. The report serves as a stark reminder of the pressing need for immediate action to address the escalating climate crisis.

data.title: Almadex Minerals announces Almaden's completion of gold loan repayment, as per secured agreement.
data.description: VANCOUVER, BC, 18th July 2025 - Almadex Minerals Ltd. has disclosed the completion of the repayment by Almaden Minerals Ltd. of the gold loan, as per the secured gold loan agreement, between the two companies. The repayment marks the conclusion of the Gold Loan and is in accordance with the press releases issued on June 27, 2024 and May 14, 2019. Almadex Minerals Ltd. operates under the ticker symbol "DEX" on the TSX-V exchange.

data.title: Workato announces speaker lineup for WOW 2025 conference happening on August 18-20 in Vegas with focus on enterprise AI.
data.description: In Palo Alto, California, Workato revealed the lineup for its flagship customer and partner conference, World of Workato (WOW) 2025. Scheduled for August 18-20 at The Cosmopolitan in Las Vegas, the conference will focus on the theme "Re(AI)lize Tomorrow" and showcase the evolving landscape of enterprise AI. The event aims to highlight the shift in AI agents.
